benchmarks.title: Tighten core system prompt
benchmarks.prompt: Improve the core agent system prompt for clarity and guardrails. Keep changes minimal and add acceptance criteria.

benchmarks.title: Clarify safe-write policy
benchmarks.prompt: Update safe-write policy docs to clarify allowed roots and critical paths. Keep changes minimal.

benchmarks.title: Add regression test for autopilot
benchmarks.prompt: Add a focused regression test for autopilot run handling of no-diff. Keep changes minimal and deterministic.
